title: Create: Food Factories
description: This is a create modpack that is designed soley for food factories.
body:
Ever wanted an awesome food industry? Create food factories is just that!

![Create: Food Factories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/812156ebd0a04d3d5d9cea9d9e14d7f6ac13d25b_0.webp)

This is the perfect _Creative Food Factory_ for your server. You can add your own create mods as it's compatible with (almost) all create 6.0.0 mods including the newest VS2 update with create!

Includes
- Botany Pots
- Create
- Create: The Salt
- Create Cafe
- Create Confectionary
- Create Deco
- Create Jetpack
- Create Railways Navigator
- Create: Slice And Dice
- Create: Bells and Whistles
- Create: Bitterballen
- Create: Central Kitchen
- Create: Deepfried
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Create: Escalated
- Create: Factory
- Create: Food
- Create: Framed
- Create: Garnished
- Create: Garnished Additions
- Create: Hypertubes
- Create: Interiors
- Create: More Features
- Create: Radars
- Create: Renewable Notch Apples
- Create: Steam n Rails
- Create: Sweets and Treats
- Create: Winery
- Effortless Structure
- Garnished Botany Pots
- Farmer's Delight
- JEI
- Kotlin For Forge
- Salt
- Smorgasbread
- Bookshelf
